name: kuzushi-security-plugin
description: Autonomous, language-aware white-box (static source) security review pipeline for Claude Code: context, x-ray, PASTA threat model, CVE threat-intel, invariant testing, adversarial threat-hunting, and memory-corruption exploitability assessment — wiring conditional LSP/MCP tooling (tree-sitter, semgrep, CodeQL, Joern). Static-only: operates on source you have on disk, with no live target, proxy, or traffic capture. Self-contained, no external engine.
